description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a flat roof and a rectangular layout, featuring large floor-to-ceiling windows along the exterior walls. The structure includes multiple rooms, visible through the open plan and transparent walls, with distinct living, dining, and bedroom areas. The exterior is clad in a combination of brown brick and white paneling, and the house is surrounded by a paved driveway and a small landscaped area with trees and shrubs. The interior is furnished with contemporary furniture, and the open spaces are accentuated by the abundance of natural light from the expansive windows. The main entrance is set back from the driveway, marked by a small patio and a clear path leading to the door. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional spaces, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor environments.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of brick and white paneling, featuring open-plan interiors and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, patio, and large windows with a landscaped area and driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the open-plan living and dining areas, visible through expansive windows and the adjacent driveway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back rooms, additional windows, and a small tree near the corner of the house.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the side extension, patio area, and the arrangement of rooms with visible interior furnishings.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows in symmetrical rows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, small patio, and direct path from the driveway, no porch or decorative columns.
